For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Plaintiff VELENCIA LEE BURTON appearing on her own behalf.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) THELMA EMMA BURTON.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff Valencia Lee Burton sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $17,212.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $5,032.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $2,088.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $24,332.00
Judgment signed in open court.
